printed.name: Swan
printed.setup: Lying prone over barrel, feet on floor, legs bent and together, hands on levers, elbows out to sides

movement.inhale: Lift trunk, straightening arms and legs, plantarflex feet
movement.exhale: Lower trunk, bending arms and legs, place feet on floor, return to position

cues: Avoid scapular elevation as arms straighten
Keep legs straight and hips extended as back lifts
Maintain contact between pelvis and barrel
